div.div: Option A: ILB + Serverless NEG via VPN

div.div:
LB Required: Yes (Internal ALB)
Traffic Path: Via VPN tunnels
DNS: A record → ILB IP
Cost: ~$91/mo (ILB + VPN)
Scale: URL map routing (2K rules/map)
VPN Dependency: Yes
Best for: Full traffic control,
custom domains, Cloud Armor

div.div:
LB Required: No
Traffic Path: Google backbone (bypasses VPN)
DNS: *.run.app → restricted VIP
Cost: ~$0.20/mo (DNS only)
Scale: No bottleneck
VPN Dependency: No
Best for: Simplest setup,
lowest cost, maximum scale

div.div: Option C: PSC Endpoint for Google APIs

div.div:
LB Required: No
Traffic Path: PSC → Google backbone (bypasses VPN)
DNS: *.run.app → PSC endpoint IP
Cost: ~$18/mo (PSC forwarding rule)
Scale: No bottleneck
VPN Dependency: No
Best for: Enterprise governance,
VPC-SC, explicit internal IP

div.div:
LB Required: Yes (Internal ALB)
Traffic Path: PSC tunnel (bypasses VPN)
DNS: Custom domain → PSC endpoint IP
Cost: ~$36/mo (ILB + PSC)
Scale: ILB + SA per service group
VPN Dependency: No
Best for: Cross-org isolation,
approval-based access control

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 248, 225), rgb(30, 24, 4)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(249, 168, 37), rgb(149, 79, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1514px; height: 1px; padding-top: 475px; margin-left: 15px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #3C4043;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#3C4043, #b3b7b9); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Quick Decision Guide
Need traffic control / custom domains / Cloud Armor? → Option A (ILB via VPN) or Option D (PSC Service Attachment)
Want simplest setup with lowest cost? → Option B (PGA)
Need enterprise governance with explicit IP? → Option C (PSC for Google APIs)
Need cross-org isolation with approval model? → Option D (PSC Service Attachment)
Scaling to 1000+ services with minimal infra? → Option B or C
